home.title: Triada Estetic Center — Beauty Salon in Tirana
home.description: Elegant beauty salon in Tirana: hair, makeup, nails and esthetics. Balayage, hair extensions, lip filler, laser hair removal and solarium. Book on WhatsApp.

makeup.description: Day, bridal, event and full glam makeup by the artists at Triada Estetic Center, Tirana. Book on WhatsApp.

about.title: About Us

contact.title: Contact & Location
contact.description: Find us at Rruga Sokrat Miho, Tirana. Open every day 09:00–20:00. Book on WhatsApp or leave a Google review.
